notes.late_window_name: peak2 when a detected second peak exists; otherwise the final fallback window returned by window_ranges().
notes.tau_out: first time the chain enters any outside state
notes.tau_mem: first time the chain crosses a membrane corridor-to-outside edge
notes.delta_clipping: local delta values are clipped into [0, 1] by the transition kernel

kappa_protocol.interpretation: hold the already-scanned symmetric directional permeability fixed while sweeping unswept geometry/bias parameters
